# GlobalStack
# Optimised for LLM consumption
# Auto-generated 2026-03-30 - do not edit manually

## Product
Move money across Africa and the world. In seconds.
One API to accept, hold, convert, and pay out funds across 12 currencies in 18 African markets, powered by stablecoin infrastructure.

## How it works
One API. Every direction money moves.
Send, receive, or hold - GlobalStack handles the conversion, routing, and settlement. You just call the API.

### Flow 01 - Send to Africa
POST /v1/send
Initiate in stablecoins. It arrives as NGN, KES, GHS, or mobile money in a few minutes - no FX desks, no correspondent delays.

### Flow 02 - Receive from Africa
POST /v1/receive
Accept local currency payments across 18 markets. Settlement hits your wallet as stablecoins, instantly.

### Flow 03 - USD account
POST /v1/account
Hold stablecoins in a programmable account. Sweep to any supported market on demand, at any time.

## For developers
Built API-first. Documented for humans.
One integration gives you full coverage: OpenAPI spec, a sandbox that mirrors production, and real-time webhook events from day one.

### Features
- Single unified API: One integration covers all three flows. No separate SDKs, no per-country endpoints.
- Webhook events: Get notified the moment a payment moves. Build reactive logic without polling.
- Production-grade sandbox: A full mirror of production. Test every flow before you ship a single line to live.
- OpenAPI spec: Download the spec and generate typed clients in any language, instantly.

## By the numbers
Built to handle volume. Designed to stay out of your way.

- 18 - African markets, live
- Minutes - From initiation to local delivery
- Stablecoins - Native - no conversion middlemen
- 24/7 - Always on, no settlement windows

## Supported markets
- Nigeria (NG) - NGN
- Kenya (KE) - KES
- Ghana (GH) - GHS
- South Africa (ZA) - ZAR
- Tanzania (TZ) - TZS
- Uganda (UG) - UGX
- Ethiopia (ET) - ETB
- Rwanda (RW) - RWF
- Senegal (SN) - XOF
- Ivory Coast (CI) - XOF
- Cameroon (CM) - XAF
- Zambia (ZM) - ZMW
- Zimbabwe (ZW) - ZWL
- Mozambique (MZ) - MZN
- Angola (AO) - AOA
- Egypt (EG) - EGP
- Morocco (MA) - MAD
- Tunisia (TN) - TND
- Algeria (DZ) - DZD

## Settlement
Currency: Stablecoins (ERC-20 compatible)
Time: A few minutes

## Developed by
Paystack - paystack.com
TSGLabs - tsglabs.com

## Status
Now in private beta
